message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam frameBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam frameBorderColor #000000

participant "halon" as halon
participant "ios1" as ios1
participant "ios2" as ios2
participant "client" as client

frame "SNS operation start" {
    note over halon,client: notification [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
    
    loop "until all ios are ready"
        halon -> ios2: repair status request
        ios2 --> halon: repair status reply
    end
    
    halon -> ios2: spiel_repair_start
    activate ios2
    note over ios2: repair process
}

alt "sucessful case"
    ios2 --> halon: notify [(pool, repaired), (disk, repaired)]
    deactivate ios2
    
    frame "SNS status query" {
        loop "unil all ios are in IDLE"
            halon -> ios2: repair status request
            ios2 --> halon: repair status reply [IDLE, IDLE]
        end
        
        halon -> client: notify [(pool, REPAIRED), (disk, REPAIRED)]
    end
else "partial repair"
    ios2 --> halon: notify [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
    note over halon,client: Abort SNS operation
else "transient disk"
    ios2 --> halon: notify [(disk, transient)]
    note over halon,client: Pause SNS operation
else "failed disk"
    ios2 --> halon: notify [(disk, failed)]
    note over halon,client: Abort SNS operation
end

@enduml
```
